2603.20843.title: HiCI: Hierarchical Construction-Integration for Long-Context Attention
2603.20843.paper_summary: Long-context language modeling is commonly framed as a scalability challenge of token-level attention, yet local-to-global information structuring remains largely implicit in existing approaches. Drawing on cognitive theories of discourse comprehension, we propose HiCI (Hierarchical Construction--Integration), a hierarchical attention module that constructs segment-level representations, integrates them into a shared global context, and broadcasts both to condition segment-level attention. We validate HiCI through parameter-efficient adaptation of LLaMA-2 with only <5.5% additional parameters, extending context from 4K to 100K tokens (7B) and 64K tokens (13B). Across language modeling, retrieval, and instruction-following benchmarks, HiCI yields consistent improvements over strong baselines, including matching proprietary models on topic retrieval and surpassing GPT-3.5-Turbo-16K on code comprehension. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of explicit hierarchical structuring as an inductive bias for long-context modeling.
2603.20843.paper_summary_zh: 長期上下文語言建模通常被視為令牌級注意力的可擴展性挑戰，然而在現有方法中，從局部到全局的信息結構仍然在很大程度上是隱含的。基於認知話語理解理論，我們提出了HiCI（層次建構-整合），這是一個層次注意力模組，能夠構建段落級表示，將其整合到共享的全局上下文中，並將這兩者廣播以調節段落級注意力。我們通過對LLaMA-2進行參數高效的適應來驗證HiCI，僅增加<5.5%的額外參數，將上下文從4K擴展到100K令牌（7B）和64K令牌（13B）。在語言建模、檢索和遵循指令的基準測試中，HiCI在強基準上持續帶來改進，包括在主題檢索中匹配專有模型，並在代碼理解上超越GPT-3.5-Turbo-16K。這些結果證明了明確的層次結構作為長期上下文建模的歸納偏差的有效性。
2603.20843.author: Xiangyu Zeng et.al.
2603.20843.authors: Xiangyu Zeng, Qi Xu, Yunke Wang, Chang Xu
